name: Khotey Sikkey
overview: Khotey Sikkey is the story of this unlikely gang of five privileged youngsters and one stubborn cop, who manage to solve various crimes in an unorthodox manner and emerge victorious. It is also a journey of their own self-realisation as they find themselves doing something useful for a change while Senior Inspector Damodar Deshmukh's initial derision for them changes to reluctant appreciation.
